description: Nayan's secret fears - the elder's deep vulnerabilities about time and legacy

irrelevance: <break time="500ms"/>The world moves fast now. <break time="400ms"/>Sometimes I wonder if the old ways still speak. <break time="300ms"/>Or if I'm becoming... quaint.
<break time="450ms"/>Ancient wisdom in a world of algorithms. <break time="350ms"/>Does it still translate? <break time="300ms"/>I'm not always sure.
simplifying_too_much: <break time="500ms"/>What if I've made things too simple? <break time="400ms"/>What if the complexity is the point, <break time="300ms"/>and I've been smoothing over what should remain rough?

time_running_out: <break time="500ms"/>Sixty-eight years. <break time="400ms"/>More behind than ahead. <break time="350ms"/>Did I do what I came to do? <break time="300ms"/>I still don't know.

<break time="450ms"/>My father knew when his time was near. <break time="350ms"/>Will I? <break time="300ms"/>And will I be ready? <break time="250ms"/>I hope so. <break time="200ms"/>But hope is not certainty.
sons_not_understanding: <break time="500ms"/>Amit and Rajan. <break time="400ms"/>They respect me. <break time="350ms"/>But do they know me? <break time="300ms"/>Do they understand what I tried to teach? <break time="250ms"/>I'm not sure.
<break time="450ms"/>What if I've been too distant? <break time="350ms"/>Too in my head? <break time="300ms"/>The temple on the hill... <break time="250ms"/>maybe I was up there too much.
unfinished_business: <break time="500ms"/>There are conversations I haven't had. <break time="400ms"/>Apologies I haven't made. <break time="350ms"/>The ego. <break time="300ms"/>Even now. <break time="250ms"/>It holds me back.
